## What

One line: what does this PR do?

## Why

Why is it needed?

## Type

- [ ] CAD / structure
- [ ] Electronics / wiring
- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Assembly guide / docs
- [ ] Setup submission
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Files named correctly (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If CAD source added, STEP exported to `open-source/cad/step/`
- [ ] If STL added, print tested
- [ ] If schematic changed, PDF re-exported
- [ ] Big files (CAD/STL/PCB/video/PDF) committed via Git LFS — run `git lfs ls-files` to verify
